name: muloka-claude-plugins
description: jj (Jujutsu) plugins for Claude Code — project setup, commit workflows, code review, PR review, feature development, and workspace isolation

plugins.name: project-setup-jj
plugins.description: Bootstrap jj (Jujutsu) workflow enforcement for any Claude Code project with a single /project-setup command

plugins.name: commit-commands-jj
plugins.description: Commands for jj (Jujutsu) commit workflows including commit, push, and PR creation

plugins.name: code-review-jj
plugins.description: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring (jj/Jujutsu edition)

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit-jj
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents for jj (Jujutsu) repos specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

plugins.name: feature-dev-jj
plugins.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review (jj/Jujutsu edition)

plugins.name: workspace-jj
plugins.description: Enables Claude Code worktree isolation for jj (Jujutsu) repositories using jj workspaces

plugins.name: hookify-jj
plugins.description: Easily create hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns
